Do you mind cookies?

We use cookies for anonymous stats — deny if you must, we're still cool.

Customize Consent Preferences

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... 

Always Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

No cookies to display.

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

No cookies to display.

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

  • Cookie
    _ga_*
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views.
  • Cookie
    _ga
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.

Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.

No cookies to display.

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

No cookies to display.

hackathon by Venom Network

Jumeirah Mina A'Salam, Dubai, UAE
17 – 18 April, 2024

Prizes

Share the prize pool of over $200,000 worth of VENOM tokens!

Token prizes

Occupy one of 15 prize places in any track and get rewarded in VENOM tokens!

$100,000+

Liquidity

Become a winner and get your token boosted at Web3.World with VENOM liquidity!

Venom SMM

Get dedicated highlights of your project exposed to hundreds of thousands of Venom social media subscribers!

Facilitated listings

The most popular and successful tokens will get a chance for facilitated listing at Web3.World and Oasis.Gallery

Apply now

Join the token rush!

Participate in showcasing Venom's versatility and power! Craft and elevate any token type on the Venom network—from memecoins and NFTs to utility and security tokens. Embrace creativity and explore the full potential of Venom's capabilities.

Track 1Fungible tokens

Ignite your creativity: design and promote your fungible token, whether it's an entertaining memecoin or a sophisticated security token for institutions!

Requirements

  • Create and deploy TIP-3 token on Venom mainnet
  • Build and publish project landing page
  • Create a minimalistic whitepaper explaining storytelling, token utilities and tokenomics
  • Create a trading pair with your token on Web3.World
  • Promote your token and boost the trading

Judging criteria

  • Trading volumes
  • TVL
  • Creativity
  • Technical implementation

Prizes

Place Prize Buyout liquidity SMM highlights
1 20,000 20,000 +
2 18,500 18,500 +
3 17,000 17,000 +
4 15,500 15,500 +
5 14,000 14,000 +
6—10 6,500 6,500 +
11—15 6,500 6,500
All prizes are nominated in VENOM tokens. Buyout liquidity means purchasing of project tokens at W3W for the indicated amount of VENOM tokens.
Token Builder Venom Wallet TIP-3 Docs Web3.World

Track 2NFT & VEP-1155

Merge your creative genius with Venom's capabilities: craft unique digital art collections or tokenized asset projects!

Requirements

  • Create and deploy TIP-4 or VEP-1155 collection on Venom mainnet
  • Build and publish project landing page
  • Introduce at least 30 distinctive items in the collection
  • Promote your collection and boost the trading of your items on Oasis.Gallery

Judging criteria

  • Creativity
  • Trading volumes
  • Collection valuation
  • Technical implementation

Prizes

Place Prize Buyout liquidity SMM highlights
1 12,500 12,500 +
2 11,750 11,750 +
3 11,000 11,000 +
4 10,250 10,250 +
5 9,500 9,500 +
6—10 4,500 4,500 +
11—15 4,500 4,500
All prizes are nominated in VENOM tokens. Buyout liquidity means purchasing of project tokens at W3W for the indicated amount of VENOM tokens.
Deploy Scripts TIP-4 Docs VEP-1155 Docs Oasis.Gallery

Popular tokens may be whitelisted on and get bonus liquidity. Start as soon as possible and feel free to experiment.

Come chill with us

Join in Telegram

Questions? Answers

Who can participate?
Absolutely anyone who is willing to build on Venom.
How do I submit my work?
You can submit any time, evaluation will be done after the deadline. You don't have to wait till the end to submit.
What is the judging criteria?
Submissions will be evaluated based on, but not limited to trading volume, token popularity among users, amount of transactions.
I have another question.
Join our Telegram group.
How do I make sure my project is eligible for hackathon prizes?
Ensure your project avoids illegal, unethical activities, plagiarism, financial law non-compliance, harm, privacy violations, misinformation, and environmental damage. For clarity, refer to the hackathon rules or reach out to organizers.
How much does it cost to attend?
Attendance is free.
How many people can be on a team?
While there's no strict limit, a team of 3-5 members is ideal for efficiency.
Is online participation possible?
Part of the team may be working online, but at least one representative must be available on-premise. Moreover, all participants must be registered via the application form.
How many teams can attend the hackathon?
The hackathon will host up to 100 teams.
What if I've never been to a hackathon or worked with Venom before?
No issue. Consider joining an experienced team for guidance. Learn everything necessary from the Venom website: venom.network.
When can I start working on my project?
You can start right after submitting your application for participation.
Any questions?Feel free to join our Telegram Group
Join in Telegram
